text:
On Sat, Jul 13, 2013 at 07:46:49PM +0400, Lev Serebryakov wrote:
> Hello, Bug-followup.
> 
>   Is it still a problem with latest 1.8?
>   Unfortunately, I can not reproduce it, but I don't have sparc64 system.

Yep, still seems to be a problem, though I think there's something funnily
broken in sparc64's dynamic libs goo -- it's not just subversion that's
having trouble on my machine.  Tragically, I've not been able to chase it
down.

--nwf;
